name: Ancient Gear Dragon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>古代の機械竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>アンティーク・ギアドラゴン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Cannot be Special Summoned. If you control no monsters, or all monsters you control are EARTH Machine monsters, you can Normal Summon this card without Tributing. When your opponent activates a Spell/Trap Card or effect (Quick Effect): You can send to the GY, 1 Machine monster from your hand or face-up field, or 1 "Ancient Gear Golem" from your Deck; negate that effect. You can only use this effect of "Ancient Gear Dragon" once per turn.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Special Summoned. If you control no monsters, or all monsters you control are EARTH Machine monsters, you can Normal Summon this card without Tributing. When your opponent activates a Spell/Trap Card or effect (Quick Effect): You can send to the GY, 1 Machine monster from your hand or face-up field, or 1 "Ancient Gear Golem" from your Deck; negate that effect. You can only use this effect of "Ancient Gear Dragon" once per turn.
eff: Cannot be Special Summoned. If you control no monsters, or all monsters you control are EARTH Machine monsters, you can Normal Summon this card without Tributing. When your opponent activates a Spell/Trap Card or effect (Quick Effect): You can send to the GY, 1 Machine monster from your hand or face-up field, or 1 "Ancient Gear Golem" from your Deck; negate that effect. You can only use this effect of "Ancient Gear Dragon" once per turn.

action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
Sends from Deck to Graveyard for cost
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Spell Cards
Negates the effects of your opponent's Trap Cards
